title: An Act authorizing the town of Maynard to prohibit or restrict the application of second-generation anticoagulant rodenticides

abstracts.abstract: By Representative Hogan of Stow, a petition (accompanied by bill, House, No. 5247) of Kate Hogan (by vote of the town) that the town of Maynard be authorized to prohibit or restrict the application of second-generation anticoagulant rodenticides in said town.  Environment and Natural Resources.  [Local Approval Received.]

actions.description: Referred to the committee on Environment and Natural Resources

related_entities.name: committee on Environment and Natural Resources

actions.description: Hearing scheduled for 07/01/2026 from 10:00 AM-12:00 PM in B-1
